delete.summary: Remove messages in conversation for self.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for removing messages in conversation for self in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is removing messages for self from a conversation.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation from which to remove messages for self.

parameters.name: messageIds
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of message ids to be removed for self from conversation.

delete.description: Remove messages in conversation for self in a project in an account.

delete.summary: Remove messages in conversation for everyone.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for removing messages in conversation for everyone in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is removing messages for everyone from a conversation.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation from which to remove messages for everyone.

parameters.name: messageIds
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of message ids to be removed for everyone from conversation.

delete.description: Remove messages in conversation for everyone in a project in an account.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for deleting a conversation for self in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is deleting a conversation for self.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation which is being deleted for self.

delete.description: Delete a conversation for self in a project in an account.

delete.summary: Remove all messages in conversation for self.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for removing all messages in conversation for self in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is removing messages for self from a conversation.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation from which to remove all messages for self.

delete.description: Remove all messages in conversation for self in a project in an account.

remove_messages_for_everyone.title: Response of remove messages for everyone in conversation request

msg.description: Message of successfull removal of messages for everyone.

remove_messages_for_everyone.description: Successfully removed messages for everyone in conversation.

remove_messages.title: Response of remove messages for self in conversation request

msg.description: Message of successfull removal of messages for self.

remove_messages.description: Successfully removed messages for self in conversation.

delete_conversation_locally.title: Response of delete conversation locally request

msg.description: Message of conversation being deleted locally successfully.

clear_conversation.title: Response of clear conversation request

msg.description: Message of successfull removal of messages for conversation.

clear_conversation.description: Successfully removed all messages for conversation.

error.description: The message of the error raised.

example: The message of the first error raised.
The message of the second error raised.
error_key.description: Array containing list of error messages.

error.description: The message of the error raised.
The message of the error raised.
The message of the error raised.

Error_403_delete_messages.title: Error_403_delete_messages

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_delete_messages.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_403_delete_conversation_locally.title: Error_403_delete_conversation_locally

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_delete_conversation_locally.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_403_clear_conversation.title: Error_403_clear_conversation

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_clear_conversation.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_400_remove_messages_for_everyone.title: Error_400_remove_messages_for_everyone

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_remove_messages_for_everyone.description: errorCode- 0 => Conversation not found or not allowed to remove messages, 1 => Messages not found or not allowed to remove messages for everyone.

Error_400_remove_messages.title: Error_400_remove_messages

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_remove_messages.description: errorCode- 0 => Conversation not found or not allowed to remove messages, 1 => Messages not found or not allowed to remove messages for self.

Error_400_delete_conversation_locally.title: Error_400_delete_conversation_locally

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_delete_conversation_locally.description: Conversation not found or not allowed to delete conversation locally.

Error_400_clear_conversation.title: Error_400_clear_conversation

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_clear_conversation.description: errorCode- 0 => Conversation not found or not allowed to clear conversation, 1 => Messages not found or not allowed to clear conversation(already cleared).
